name: Ayush Mangal
bio: Builder, tinkerer, and AI obsessive. Ayush leads product strategy and AI architecture, turning ambitious ideas into working systems.

name: Snehal
bio: Snehal crafts visual identities and interfaces that are as functional as they are beautiful. She believes good design is invisible — it just feels right.

name: Vaibhav
bio: Vaibhav turns complex requirements into clean, scalable code. He specialises in modern web stacks and integrating AI into production-grade applications.
